title: No URL-based routing for view state
description: All views (New Chat, Teams, Documents, Projects, Agent Profiles, Search, individual conversations) share the same URL path '/'. The app does not use URL-based routing, making deep-linking, bookmarking, and browser back/forward navigation impossible.
expected: Each view should have a unique URL path (e.g., /teams, /documents, /chat/:id) so that browser navigation and bookmarks work correctly.
actual: URL is always http://localhost:1927/ regardless of which view is active.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Open the app
2. Navigate to any view (Teams, Documents, etc.)
3. Observe the URL remains unchanged at '/'

title: No state recovery on page refresh
description: When viewing a specific conversation or view, refreshing the page returns to the default empty state. The app does not persist the current view state in URL, localStorage, or sessionStorage for recovery.
expected: After refreshing, the app should return to the same view/conversation that was active before refresh.
actual: App always returns to the default New Chat view after any page refresh.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Open the app
2. Click on any conversation (e.g., 'Crispy Meadow')
3. Refresh the page
4. Observe: returns to default empty state, not the conversation

title: No 404 page for unknown routes
description: Navigating to a non-existent route like /does-not-exist loads the main app without any error or 404 indication.
expected: Either redirect to home with a notification, or show a 404 page for unknown routes.
actual: Main app loads normally on any URL path.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Navigate to http://localhost:1927/does-not-exist
2. App loads normally with no error indication
